title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI coding automation system. The adapter enables end-to-end workflows where a Jira ticket triggers Archon to fix bugs and open pull requests, with results posted back to the ticket. Each ticket receives a dedicated conversation context within Archon.
